overall.description: First-person game engine footage walking along a rocky dirt path through open grassland at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The player approaches and passes a solitary tree standing beside the trail, with tall grass and distant tree lines visible in the darkness.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a rocky dirt path through open grassland at night, illuminated by a flashlight. A solitary tree stands prominently ahead in the center of the trail, gradually shifting to the right side as the camera approaches and passes it. Tall grass flanks both sides of the path while a distant tree line is visible on the horizon against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark, rocky trail that leads the viewer past a solitary landmark in an open grassland. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the night, illuminating a dirt path flanked by tall grass and a distant tree line on the horizon. As the camera advances, a single tree standing prominently in the center of the trail gradually shifts toward the right side of the frame. The scene concludes as the camera passes the tree, continuing its steady progression deeper into the nocturnal landscape.
